notes: Baseline captured against local dev server at http://localhost:3000. The acceptance contract references locale-prefixed URL /uk/en-GB/category/mens-clothing-jackets which returns 404 in the current site config — the working PLP is at /category/mens-clothing-jackets (no locale prefix). This 404 is a pre-existing routing configuration issue, not a feature defect. The Quick View modal trigger (data-testid='quick-view-trigger') does not exist yet — this is expected since the feature has not been implemented. Key pre-existing noise: (1) React SSR hydration getServerSnapshot warning, (2) PageDesignerProvider defaultProps deprecation warning, (3) Data Cloud analytics endpoint DNS failure (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED for salesforce.com c360a domain), (4) Two 403 Forbidden responses from SFCC API (likely recommendations/configurations endpoints requiring auth not available in local dev). All of these are platform-level issues unrelated to the quick-view feature.
